_comment: Stable aliases → exact agy model labels (as they appear in ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json and the TUI 'Switch Model' list). agy's --model CLI flag is unreliable — an unknown id silently falls back to the default. The reliable way to switch models is to write the exact label into settings.json (this is what the TUI does); --print then respects it. The '(Low/Medium/High)' suffix is the thinking-effort level (no separate CLI flag — it is part of the model variant). If a label here is wrong, agy will silently keep the previous model: open the `agy` TUI → Switch Model to read the exact strings for your account, then `/agy:model "<exact label>"`. Model availability depends on the account tier (free = Flash / Flash-Lite only; Pro adds 3.1 Pro and the Claude/GPT-OSS variants).

notes.sintesis-calidad: pro o pro-high — para la síntesis final donde importa la calidad
